parameters.formDescription: Enter the niche and location to search for leads

nodes.name: Wait (token activation)
nodes.notes: Google requires a short delay before next_page_token becomes valid. 3s is safe (min required is ~2s).

nodes.name: Next Page Search
nodes.notes: Loops back into 'Has Next Page?' - continues until Google stops returning next_page_token (max 3 pages / 60 results total).
